title: fraxinoides alba
intro: Fraxinoides alba, also known as White Ash, is a deciduous tree native to eastern North America, characterized by its white or silver-green bark and compound leaves. The bark of Fraxinoides alba contains a compound called fraxin, which has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Fraxinoides alba include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as having antimicrobial and antiseptic properties. Fraxinoides alba is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used as a topical treatment for skin conditions and wounds.
